$comment: Layer B selection cases for PAYSLIP vs the real GnuCOBOL harness image (file I/O stage 1). The legacy side runs the wrapper entrypoint: program output (EMP_ID/ROWS) followed by the serialized slip.dat records (GRS/TAX/NET), one KV stream. A candidate that loses the last record ships a slip without NET and reports ROWS=2 - caught on every case. Cases cover a typical slip, a half-cent ROUNDED tax, a tax rounding to zero, and zero gross.

legacy.label: COBOL 85 PAYSLIP (GnuCOBOL via harness image legacymind/legacy-payslip, file-serializing wrapper)
